name: Awesome Hacking Lists
what_it_does: A curated collection of GitHub-starred repositories organized by programming language, focused on penetration testing tools and security utilities. This is a reference list, not an MCP server or executable tool.
use_cases: Discovering penetration testing tools by language
Browsing categorized exploit and security research tools
best_when: You need a broad catalog of security and penetration testing repositories organized by programming language.
avoid_when: You need an actual MCP server, executable tool, or actionable security automation.

auth.notes: No auth required; static reference list.

pricing.notes: Open source curated list on GitHub.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Not applicable; this is a static list, not software.
known_agent_gotchas: This is a curated list of repos, not an MCP server or tool
No curation criteria or maintenance schedule documented
Appears auto-generated from GitHub stars rather than hand-curated

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
